title: Evoges Fully Magnetic P Plates for New Drivers, Reusable, Easy to attach, Weather resistant, 0.9mm Thickness for secure attachment, Green, UK Compliant, Pack of 2
features: Enhanced Visibility and Durability: Magnetic P plates are designed with high-quality materials to ensure they remain highly visible in various weather conditions. Their vibrant colors and reflective surfaces help new drivers stay noticeable on the road
Ease of Application and Removal: These plates can be easily attached to and removed from a vehicle without causing any damage or leaving any residue, making them convenient for temporary use

Secure and Reliable Attachment: The magnetic backing ensures the plates stay securely in place, even at high speeds and in adverse weather conditions, reducing the risk of losing or damaging the plates during driving

Enhanced Magnetic Strength: At 0.9mm thickness, the magnetic force is strong enough to securely adhere to the vehicle, preventing the plates from detaching unexpectedly, which is a common issue with thinner alternatives
Weather Resistant: Built to withstand various environmental conditions, these plates resist rain, wind, and UV exposure, ensuring long-lasting performance and maintaining their appearance over time
